$comment: DELIVERY and UPGRADE are capabilities, distinct from the capabilities they carry.
upgrade 3/3, contrast 0/3) and version-bound to this plugin.json version. A real agent
installed the current release AND upgraded from an older release through the github
marketplace path (marketplace add / install / update — NOT --plugin-dir) and got a
working /vfkb:brief; the can-fail contrast arm, with the capability stripped, observed
'Unknown command: /vfkb:brief'. This is the delivery ADR-0051 said was unproven.
`delivery` is not a dial. The gate DERIVES the true status from
scenarios/records/install-path.json and fails on any mismatch: it flips back to
`unproven` (and re-requires the README disclosure) automatically if a release ships
without re-pinning the record to the new pluginVersion. Editing this by hand goes red.
